items.title: Ontario premier says Trump's criticism of Canada's efforts to stop wildfires is 'absolutely unacceptable'

items.title: Wildfire smoke from Canada and Minnesota pushes farther into the U.S. and engulfs D.C. in haze

items.title: Air Canada flight from LAX veers off taxiway, onto grass, video shows
